channel.title: Stockyard Blog
channel.description: Building LLM infrastructure in the open.

item.title: Replacing 134 LLM Tools with One Binary
item.description: The LLM middleware ecosystem is fragmented across 134+ standalone tools. Here's how Stockyard consolidates them into a single Go binary.

item.title: Architecture Decisions Behind Stockyard
item.description: Why Go, why SQLite, why a single binary, and why 70 middleware modules instead of a plugin system.

item.title: Why I Built Stockyard
item.description: I was building an app with the OpenAI API. Then I shipped it. Within the first week, three things went wrong.
